panel.title: Support Ticket
panel.description:
Click the button below to open a ticket.
A team member will assist you as soon as possible.

ticketOpened.title: Ticket Opened

ratingRequest.title: How was your support?
ratingRequest.description:
Please rate your support experience for ticket **#{count}**.
Your feedback helps us improve.

notifyOptIn.description: 🔕 Click the button below if you want to receive a **DM notification** when a staff member replies to your ticket.

ratingReceived.title: ✅ Rating received
ratingReceived.description: Thank you for your feedback! You rated **{label}**.

closeReason.title: Close Ticket
closeReason.label: Reason for closing
closeReason.placeholder: Please provide a reason for closing this ticket.

rateComment.title: Rate Ticket
rateComment.label: Comment (optional)
rateComment.placeholder: Would you like to add anything to your rating?

messages.ticketAlreadyClaimed: ❌ This ticket has already been claimed by {user}!
messages.topicUpdateWarning: > ⚠️ *The channel topic will be updated shortly — Discord limits topic changes to 2 per 10 minutes, so this may take a moment.*
messages.ticketLimitReached: ❌ You can only have **{limit}** open tickets at a time.
messages.blacklisted: ❌ You are blacklisted and cannot open tickets.
messages.noPermission: ❌ You do not have permission for this action.
messages.notATicket: ❌ This channel is not a ticket.
messages.onlyStaff: ❌ Only staff can perform this action.
messages.userAdded: ✅ {user} has been added to the ticket.
messages.userRemoved: ✅ {user} has been removed from the ticket.
messages.autoCloseWarning: ⚠️ This ticket will be automatically closed in **{hours}** hours due to inactivity.
messages.blacklistAdded: ✅ {user} has been added to the blacklist.
messages.blacklistRemoved: ✅ {user} has been removed from the blacklist.
messages.configError: ⚠️ Configuration error. Please contact the bot operator!
messages.snippet_not_in_ticket: ❌ This command can only be used inside an open ticket.
messages.snippet_list_empty:
ℹ️ No snippets are configured yet.
Copy `config/snippets.example.jsonc` to `config/snippets.jsonc` and adjust it.
messages.snippet_not_found: ❌ Snippet **{name}** not found. Use `/snippet list` for an overview.
messages.ticketLocked: 🔒 This ticket has been locked. You cannot send messages until a staff member unlocks it.
messages.ticketUnlocked: 🔓 This ticket has been unlocked. You may now send messages again.
messages.noAccessToType: ❌ You do not have access to this ticket type.
messages.ticketCreateFailed: ❌ Ticket could not be created. Please try again.
messages.renameEmpty: ❌ The name contains no valid characters (only letters, numbers and hyphens are allowed).
messages.alreadyThisType: ❌ This ticket is already of this type.
messages.noOtherTypes: ❌ There are no other ticket types to move to.
messages.alreadyRated: ✅ You have already rated this ticket.
messages.onlyCreatorNotify: ❌ Only the ticket creator can toggle notifications.
messages.deleteConfirmPrompt: ⚠️ **Are you sure?** The ticket channel will be permanently deleted.
messages.closingTicket: ⏳ **The ticket is being closed.** Please wait a moment while the transcript is generated...
messages.reopenDisabled: ❌ Reopening tickets is disabled on this server.
messages.selectMoveTarget: 🔀 Where should this ticket be moved to?
messages.priorityAlreadySet: ℹ️ The priority is already set to **{priority}**.
messages.selectMoveTargetCurrent:
🔀 **Move ticket** (current: **{type}**)
Where should this ticket be moved to?
messages.staffReminderBody: Ticket <#{channel}> (type: **{type}**, priority: **{priority}**) is awaiting a response.
messages.staffReplyBody:
A staff member has replied in your **{type}** ticket.

[🔗 Jump to ticket]({link})
messages.broadcastResultFailed: ✅ Broadcast sent to **{sent}** ticket(s). *({failed} channel(s) failed)*
messages.panelChannelNotFound: ❌ Channel `{channel}` not found. Please check `openTicketChannelId` in the config.
messages.panelSendFailed: ❌ Failed to send the panel. Are the bot permissions correct?
messages.cannotRemoveCreator: ❌ The ticket creator cannot be removed.
